textByHash.552892243f5a5621e250d6b8da95cb5ac1565e98: Hello there, the lead navigator should be able to answer any questions you've got.
textByHash.774a743cb8846e89ab15613d9a8c425c55cdaf6d: I'm John, I specialise in archaeology and there's some very interesting ruins in this area.
textByHash.52a11c78f45c9cb1e3e0b096cd4f3cd646e9f775: Oh my word no. Archaeology is the study of sentient races history through study of artefacts and ruins.
textByHash.a1c80cd86b484e5e4572ca0d5e5aca61829497e7: Well... we have no proof to suggest such.
textByHash.f5d61051dcdd9c5e6adf4b5e37594bd5f246d717: This is our base camp for exploration of this wonderful island.
textByHash.733fe8e6dad25b0d43981eb5e3ac23d579e8b22b: No, no. You've already helped admirably. Our lives are much more comfortable thank you.
textByHash.ba4d78bd468a491c9956c38d0e2a4471b91a7f4e: Explore! There's so much here we don't understand.
textByHash.ef055f726389233226ba114f43af29b9f09a1ad3: I've heard there's a pretty spectacular structure up near the mountain, but I haven't gone there yet.
textByHash.f5a3b0327f24ca4fa5b292403b9d2dd627a176c3: The paleontologists are getting very excited as there are fossils everywhere. Apparently even the sea birds use them to make their nests!
textByHash.18539e43fafa6320f82059c3562ceccd3c8c08fd: Have you heard about the wyverns? We saw some of them flying the first day we were here, but haven't found them since.
